topics.name: Describe cloud concepts
modules: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

topics.name: Describe Azure architecture and services
modules: Describe the core architectural components of Azure
Describe Azure compute and networking services
Describe Azure identity, access, and security

topics.name: Describe Azure management and governance
modules: Describe features and tools in Azure for governance and compliance
Describe features and tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

questions.question: Which cloud characteristic helps you automatically scale resources for app-engineering-1000 during peak traffic in East US?
questions.explanation: Elasticity enables automatic scaling to match demand.

reasoning.correct: Core cloud benefit is the ability to scale up/down dynamically.

why_others_wrong.1: Latency is a metric, not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.2: Opposite of cloud.
why_others_wrong.3: Cloud is OpEx oriented; CapEx is not a cloud characteristic.

questions.question: Which Azure service is PaaS for hosting web apps with deployment slots?
questions.explanation: App Service is a PaaS web hosting platform with deployment slots.

reasoning.correct: Provides managed runtime, scaling, and slots.

why_others_wrong.1: Stores container images; not a hosting platform.
why_others_wrong.2: IaaS, not PaaS.
why_others_wrong.3: Serverless compute, not general web app PaaS.

questions.question: To enforce tagging for all resources in rg-engineering-prod-102, which tool should you use?
questions.explanation: Azure Policy evaluates and enforces compliance such as required tags.

reasoning.correct: Policy is the governance tool for compliance at scale.

why_others_wrong.0: Controls access, not compliance rules.
why_others_wrong.1: Prevent changes or deletion but do not enforce tags.
why_others_wrong.3: Observability, not enforcement.

questions.question: Which tool estimates monthly costs for a planned solution in North Europe?
questions.explanation: Pricing calculator models estimated costs before deployment.

reasoning.correct: Used during planning for TCO estimation.

why_others_wrong.0: Reports actual/forecasted spend, not pre-deployment estimates.
why_others_wrong.2: Compliance documentation.
why_others_wrong.3: Provides optimization recommendations after deployment.

questions.question: Which feature provides physical datacenter fault isolation within a region?
questions.explanation: Availability Zones are physically separate locations within an Azure region.

reasoning.correct: Zone-level isolation increases resiliency.

why_others_wrong.0: Protect against host failures, not datacenter-level.
why_others_wrong.1: Logical grouping only.
why_others_wrong.2: Cross-region pairing for recovery, not intra-region isolation.

reasoning.correct: Zone-level isolation increases resiliency.

why_others_wrong.0: Logical grouping only.
why_others_wrong.1: Cross-region pairing for recovery, not intra-region isolation.
why_others_wrong.3: Protect against host failures, not datacenter-level.

questions.question: Which cloud characteristic helps you automatically scale resources for app-engineering-1070 during peak traffic in East US?
questions.explanation: Elasticity enables automatic scaling to match demand.

reasoning.correct: Core cloud benefit is the ability to scale up/down dynamically.

why_others_wrong.1: Cloud is OpEx oriented; CapEx is not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.2: Opposite of cloud.
why_others_wrong.3: Latency is a metric, not a cloud characteristic.

questions.question: Which Azure service is PaaS for hosting web apps with deployment slots?
questions.explanation: App Service is a PaaS web hosting platform with deployment slots.

reasoning.correct: Provides managed runtime, scaling, and slots.

why_others_wrong.0: Serverless compute, not general web app PaaS.
why_others_wrong.1: IaaS, not PaaS.
why_others_wrong.3: Stores container images; not a hosting platform.

reasoning.correct: Zone-level isolation increases resiliency.

why_others_wrong.0: Logical grouping only.
why_others_wrong.1: Protect against host failures, not datacenter-level.
why_others_wrong.2: Cross-region pairing for recovery, not intra-region isolation.

questions.question: Which cloud characteristic helps you automatically scale resources for app-engineering-1140 during peak traffic in East US?
questions.explanation: Elasticity enables automatic scaling to match demand.

reasoning.correct: Core cloud benefit is the ability to scale up/down dynamically.

why_others_wrong.0: Latency is a metric, not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.1: Cloud is OpEx oriented; CapEx is not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.3: Opposite of cloud.

questions.question: Which Azure service is PaaS for hosting web apps with deployment slots?
questions.explanation: App Service is a PaaS web hosting platform with deployment slots.

reasoning.correct: Provides managed runtime, scaling, and slots.

why_others_wrong.0: IaaS, not PaaS.
why_others_wrong.1: Stores container images; not a hosting platform.
why_others_wrong.2: Serverless compute, not general web app PaaS.

why_others_wrong.3: Observability, not enforcement.

reasoning.correct: Zone-level isolation increases resiliency.

why_others_wrong.0: Protect against host failures, not datacenter-level.
why_others_wrong.1: Cross-region pairing for recovery, not intra-region isolation.
why_others_wrong.3: Logical grouping only.

questions.question: Which cloud characteristic helps you automatically scale resources for app-engineering-1210 during peak traffic in East US?
questions.explanation: Elasticity enables automatic scaling to match demand.

reasoning.correct: Core cloud benefit is the ability to scale up/down dynamically.

why_others_wrong.1: Latency is a metric, not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.2: Cloud is OpEx oriented; CapEx is not a cloud characteristic.
why_others_wrong.3: Opposite of cloud.

questions.question: Which Azure service is PaaS for hosting web apps with deployment slots?
questions.explanation: App Service is a PaaS web hosting platform with deployment slots.

reasoning.correct: Provides managed runtime, scaling, and slots.

why_others_wrong.0: IaaS, not PaaS.
why_others_wrong.1: Serverless compute, not general web app PaaS.
why_others_wrong.3: Stores container images; not a hosting platform.

questions.question: To enforce tagging for all resources in rg-engineering-prod-312, which tool should you use?
questions.explanation: Azure Policy evaluates and enforces compliance such as required tags.

reasoning.correct: Policy is the governance tool for compliance at scale.

why_others_wrong.0: Observability, not enforcement.
why_others_wrong.1: Controls access, not compliance rules.
why_others_wrong.3: Prevent changes or deletion but do not enforce tags.

questions.question: Which tool estimates monthly costs for a planned solution in North Europe?

questions.question: Which feature provides physical datacenter fault isolation within a region?
questions.explanation: Availability Zones are physically separate locations within an Azure region.

reasoning.correct: Zone-level isolation increases resiliency.

why_others_wrong.0: Cross-region pairing for recovery, not intra-region isolation.
why_others_wrong.2: Logical grouping only.
why_others_wrong.3: Protect against host failures, not datacenter-level.

questions.question: Which cloud characteristic helps you automatically scale resources for app-engineering-1980 during peak traffic in East US?

questions.question: Which Azure service is PaaS for hosting web apps with deployment slots?

certificationInfo.title: Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
certificationInfo.description: This certification is designed for candidates who are just beginning to work with cloud-based solutions and services or are new to Azure.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge of cloud computing concepts

skills: Describe the benefits of using cloud services
Describe the core architectural components of Azure
Describe Azure compute and networking services
Describe Azure identity, access, and security
Describe features and tools in Azure for governance and compliance
Describe features and tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

skillsMeasured.category: Azure Security, Privacy, Compliance, and Trust (25-30%)
skills: Describe identity governance capabilities in Azure
Describe privacy, compliance, and data protection standards in Azure
